final_prompt.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic jewelry close-up illustration of a sapphire ring with diamond settings (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "超写实" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Albert Watson luxury product photography, Cartier campaign macro still-life tradition, 1980s–1990s high-jewellery editorial print culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be extreme macro close-up, filling the frame with the ring
Subject: must include a sapphire ring (one) with diamond pavé settings, fire and light refraction visible inside the gemstone
Scene/backdrop: must include a black velvet background
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, opulent atmosphere with light refracting inside the sapphire — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a deep-blue sapphire dominant with diamond sparkle accents against deep black — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface treatment that renders velvet texture, polished metal sheen, and gemstone internal facets with maximum tactile fidelity — exact grain and sheen levels are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
